title: No Ground Beneath the Feet [Payer Tolay Mati Nai]
overview: Set in the backdrop of the scathing consequences of climate change, an impoverished ambulance driver Saiful staggers between two wives while he sets out on a bone-tired journey of moral decay, murder, deception, and social bashing.
